Thoughtful design, built to last. Explore the collection.
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ 

Crafted between two worlds

Ember North brings together refined materials and modern craftsmanship to create pieces designed for calm, useful, long-lasting daily living.

A considered approach

Every Ember North piece is designed with intention, balancing clean lines, tactile materials and durable construction to create a timeless aesthetic.

Built to last

From initial concept to final finish, each detail is refined to ensure usefulness, comfort and quiet character that grows with everyday use.

Shop Now
 

Ember North Core

A refined everyday essential designed for balance and simplicity. Clean lines, durable materials, and a timeless form make it a natural part of any daily ritual.

Shop Now
 

Ember North Classic

A softer, more expressive piece with subtle detailing and warm materials. Designed to bring character and depth to everyday spaces without excess.

Shop Now
 

Ember North Signature

A considered statement piece, combining premium materials with a confident, modern form.
